title: Ranorama's Radical Health Bars
description: This resource pack retextures minecraft hearts to make them look like health bars!
body:
This resource pack makes minecraft hearts look like health bars instead!



- this pack only retextures survival mode hearts, not hardcore.

- this pack does not change anything about your game EXCEPT for the hearts.

- the textures in this pack (including 'pack.png') were all made in GNU Image Manipulation Program.

- this page provides three different versions of hearts I have made.

- the regular hearts (those without effects) are GREEN.

- This resource pack is licensed under [CC BY-NC-SA 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/deed.en) and may NOT be reuploaded to any mod platform with monetization enabled.
